mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dish WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT * FROM dish WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT * FROM dish WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dish (name, description, price, image, category_id, merchant_id, status, sort, stock, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{image}, #{categoryId}, #{merchantId}, #{status}, #{sort}, #{stock}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE dish SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, image = #{image}, category_id = #{categoryId}, status = #{status}, sort = #{sort}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE dish SET stock = stock - #{quantity}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND stock >= #{quantity}
